jtbds.title: Process an insurance claim end-to-end
jtbds.situation: policyholder or claimant files a loss notice; adjuster must triage, investigate, evaluate, and settle or deny within statutory timeframes
jtbds.motivation: resolve the claim fairly and quickly to meet regulatory timelines and preserve customer trust
jtbds.outcome: claim settled or denied with documented rationale, payment issued or denial letter sent
success_criteria: acknowledgement sent within 10 days of receipt
coverage determination made within 15 business days
payment or denial issued within 30 days of proof of loss
reserve set within 48 hours of assignment

jtbds.title: Underwrite a new insurance policy
jtbds.situation: broker submits a new business application; underwriter must assess risk, rate, and bind or decline coverage
jtbds.motivation: accept profitable risks at adequate price within authority limits while maintaining portfolio balance
jtbds.outcome: policy bound with documented rationale and signed binder, or declined with written reason
success_criteria: quote issued within 5 business days of complete application
premium within actuarially approved rate range
all subjectivities cleared before binding
OFAC screening completed before binding

jtbds.title: Place facultative reinsurance cession
jtbds.situation: a large or unusual risk exceeds treaty capacity; analyst must obtain facultative reinsurance from markets before binding
jtbds.motivation: protect balance sheet from catastrophic loss while remaining competitive on pricing
jtbds.outcome: facultative certificate issued, cession recorded in bordereau, premium split booked
success_criteria: fac quote obtained from at least two markets
cession recorded before policy inception
bordereau updated within 5 business days of month-end
trust fund balance verified for NY Reg 114 compliance

jtbds.title: Manage policy renewal underwriting
jtbds.situation: policy approaching expiry; underwriter must re-evaluate loss history, update rating factors, and issue renewal terms or non-renewal notice
jtbds.motivation: retain profitable accounts and achieve adequate rate on challenging ones before competitor quoting window closes
jtbds.outcome: renewal quote issued and bound, or non-renewal notice sent within statutory deadline
success_criteria: renewal review initiated 90 days before expiry
non-renewal notice sent at least 60 days before expiry
loss adjustment factor applied per actuarial indication
renewed premium variance from prior year documented

jtbds.title: Investigate suspected claim fraud
jtbds.situation: claim flagged by scoring model or adjuster referral; SIU investigator must gather evidence, assess fraud indicators, and recommend accept / deny / refer to law enforcement
jtbds.motivation: prevent fraudulent payments and deter future fraud while avoiding wrongful denials on legitimate claims
jtbds.outcome: investigation report completed with finding and disposition recommendation
success_criteria: SIU assignment acknowledged within 3 business days
investigation report completed within 45 days
law enforcement referral filed within 30 days if criminal fraud confirmed
ISO ClaimSearch cross-checked before closing

jtbds.title: Pursue subrogation recovery
jtbds.situation: claim paid where a third party is liable; specialist must identify subrogation potential, demand reimbursement, and negotiate or litigate recovery
jtbds.motivation: recover paid losses from responsible third parties to reduce net loss cost
jtbds.outcome: recovery collected and claim file closed, or subrogation waived with documented rationale
success_criteria: subrogation evaluation completed within 30 days of claim payment
demand letter issued within 60 days of payment where potential identified
arbitration or litigation filed before statute of limitations minus 90 days
recovery proceeds applied to correct claim and expense accounts

jtbds.title: Manage claim litigation
jtbds.situation: claimant or policyholder files suit; litigation manager must retain counsel, set litigation reserve, manage defense strategy, and resolve case
jtbds.motivation: achieve best possible outcome at minimum cost while protecting the insurer from precedent-setting adverse judgments
jtbds.outcome: case resolved by settlement, verdict, or dismissal with litigation reserve closed
success_criteria: defense counsel retained within 5 business days of suit filing
litigation reserve set within 10 business days
status reports received at least quarterly
settlement authority requested before mediation

jtbds.title: File regulatory compliance report
jtbds.situation: state insurance department or NAIC requires periodic filing (market conduct, financial, fraud statistics, or claim data call); compliance officer must compile, review, and submit on time
jtbds.motivation: maintain good standing with regulators and avoid fines or market conduct examinations
jtbds.outcome: report filed with regulatory authority, confirmation received and archived
success_criteria: data extracted and validated 15 days before filing deadline
management certification obtained before submission
confirmation receipt archived within 24 hours of filing
prior-year comparison variance explained if > 10%

jtbds.title: Process premium payment and reconcile
jtbds.situation: broker or policyholder remits premium; finance must apply payment, reconcile against billed amount, handle short pays, and issue receipts
jtbds.motivation: maintain accurate accounts receivable, avoid policy cancellations for non-payment, and close reconciling items within period
jtbds.outcome: payment applied to policy, receipt issued, suspense items cleared, cancellation notice avoided or reversed
success_criteria: payment applied within 2 business days of receipt
short-pay notice issued within 5 business days
suspense balance zero at month-end
cancellation reversed within 24 hours of payment clearance

jtbds.title: Audit and certify claims reserve adequacy
jtbds.situation: quarter-end or year-end requires actuarial certification that loss reserves are adequate within stated confidence interval
jtbds.motivation: ensure statutory and GAAP reserve adequacy, prevent regulator intervention, and provide accurate financial statements
jtbds.outcome: actuarial reserve opinion issued and signed, reserve adjustments booked, financial statements certified
success_criteria: reserve analysis completed by T+10 business days after period close
reserve development explained vs prior estimate
actuarial opinion signed by credentialed actuary
reserve strengthenings or releases approved by CFO

jtbds.title: Issue a new policy
jtbds.situation: underwriter has approved a risk; policy documents must be generated, countersigned, delivered to broker/insured, and activated in the policy admin system
jtbds.motivation: activate coverage and start premium billing without delay
jtbds.outcome: policy issued, signed, delivered, and active in PAS
success_criteria: documents generated within 2 hours of bind order
delivery confirmed within 24 hours
premium billing activated

jtbds.title: Process mid-term policy endorsement
jtbds.situation: insured requests a change to coverage, limits, or named insureds mid-term; change must be rated, priced, documented, and reflected in premium adjustment
jtbds.motivation: keep coverage aligned with insured risk profile without requiring a new policy
jtbds.outcome: endorsement issued, premium adjustment billed, PAS updated
success_criteria: endorsement rated within 48 hours
premium adjustment calculated and billed
policy documents updated and delivered

jtbds.title: Cancel or non-renew a policy
jtbds.situation: underwriter or insured initiates cancellation or non-renewal; statutory notice periods, return-premium calculations, and mid-term audit for auditable lines must be managed
jtbds.motivation: exit the risk cleanly while meeting all regulatory notice and refund obligations
jtbds.outcome: cancellation notice sent, return premium calculated and issued, PAS closed
success_criteria: statutory notice period observed
return premium calculated within 24 hours
refund issued within state-mandated timeframe

jtbds.title: Conduct quarterly actuarial reserve review
jtbds.situation: end-of-quarter close requires loss reserve adequacy certification; actuary pulls triangles, runs IBNR models, documents assumptions, and signs off for CFO and external auditors
jtbds.motivation: ensure reserves are adequate and opinion can be certified to regulators and auditors
jtbds.outcome: signed reserve opinion filed; management and board summary delivered
success_criteria: triangles pulled within 3 days of quarter end
IBNR models run and documented
reserve opinion signed within 10 business days

jtbds.title: Manage producer/broker appointment
jtbds.situation: new broker or MGA must be appointed: licensing verified in all target states, E&O certificate collected, appointment filed with DOI, contracting executed
jtbds.motivation: onboard new distribution partner compliantly before they can bind business
jtbds.outcome: broker active in distribution system; state appointments filed
success_criteria: license verified in all target states
E&O certificate on file
DOI appointment filed
contracting executed before first bind

jtbds.title: Handle salvage and recovery
jtbds.situation: after a total-loss claim settlement, insurer acquires salvage title and must sell the vehicle or asset to recoup value; title transfer, auction listing, and net recovery posting required
jtbds.motivation: maximize recovery on total-loss settlements to reduce net loss cost
jtbds.outcome: salvage sold, title transferred, net recovery posted to claim
success_criteria: title acquired within 10 days of settlement
salvage listed at auction within 5 business days
net recovery posted within 3 days of sale

jtbds.title: Process CAT event response
jtbds.situation: major catastrophe event generates volume spike of claims; CAT team must stand up field adjusters, triage by severity, track aggregate exposure vs reinsurance treaties, and report to executive team
jtbds.motivation: respond quickly to policyholders while protecting balance sheet via treaty recovery
jtbds.outcome: claims triaged and assigned, reinsurance notices sent, executive CAT report delivered
success_criteria: field adjusters deployed within 24 hours
claims triaged by severity within 48 hours
reinsurance notice sent within treaty reporting window

jtbds.title: File rate revision with state DOI
jtbds.situation: annual rate review determines that premium rates need adjustment; actuarial support documentation, experience data, and rate manual must be filed with DOI in each state and approved before use
jtbds.motivation: maintain rate adequacy while complying with regulatory approval requirements
jtbds.outcome: rate filing submitted; approval or objection letter received and responded to
success_criteria: filing submitted with complete actuarial support
DOI acknowledgment received
objection response filed within 30 days if applicable

jtbds.title: Manage captive insurance program
jtbds.situation: corporate risk manager administers a captive insurer: fronting arrangements, reinsurance panel, collateral posting, annual audit, and domicile-state filings all require coordinated workflow
jtbds.motivation: optimize total cost of risk while maintaining captive compliance
jtbds.outcome: captive program renewed; fronting and reinsurance contracts executed; audit filed
success_criteria: fronting agreement renewed before expiry
reinsurance panel confirmed
domicile annual report filed on time

jtbds.title: Conduct SIU investigation
jtbds.situation: claim flagged by fraud analytics requires formal SIU investigation: evidence gathering, recorded statements, social media review, ISO ClaimSearch query, potential referral to law enforcement or state fraud bureau
jtbds.motivation: detect and deter insurance fraud; protect loss ratios
jtbds.outcome: investigation closed with finding; regulatory referral filed if required
success_criteria: investigation opened within 5 days of referral
ISO ClaimSearch query completed
referral to state fraud bureau within 60 days if fraud confirmed

jtbds.title: Place E&S market coverage
jtbds.situation: risk declined by admitted market must be placed in E&S lines; wholesale broker must obtain declinations, select surplus lines carriers, file surplus lines tax, and deliver stamping-office evidence
jtbds.motivation: secure coverage for hard-to-place risks while meeting surplus lines compliance requirements
jtbds.outcome: E&S policy bound, surplus lines tax filed, stamping office evidence delivered
success_criteria: declinations obtained from admitted market
carrier selected and bound
surplus lines tax filed within state deadline

jtbds.title: Process life insurance death claim
jtbds.situation: beneficiary submits death claim; examiner must verify coverage, review death certificate and APS if contestable period applies, calculate benefit, and issue payment or denial
jtbds.motivation: pay valid claims promptly while applying contestability period scrutiny appropriately
jtbds.outcome: claim paid or denied within statutory timeline; tax forms issued
success_criteria: claim acknowledged within 10 days
contestability review completed if applicable
payment issued within 30 days of complete proof

jtbds.title: Issue Certificate of Insurance
jtbds.situation: insured requests COI for a contract counterparty; account manager must verify coverage is in force, confirm additional-insured status if required, generate certificate, and obtain broker signature
jtbds.motivation: provide evidence of coverage quickly so insured can meet contract requirements
jtbds.outcome: COI issued and delivered to certificate holder within SLA
success_criteria: COI issued within 24 hours of request
coverage in force verified
additional insured endorsement confirmed if required

jtbds.title: Settle treaty reinsurance bordereau
jtbds.situation: quarterly bordereau due to treaty reinsurers; premium and loss data must be compiled from PAS, reconciled against treaty terms, bordereau generated, and cash settled
jtbds.motivation: maintain accurate reinsurance accounting and preserve treaty relationships
jtbds.outcome: bordereau submitted to all treaty reinsurers; cash settlement confirmed
success_criteria: data compiled within 5 days of quarter end
bordereau submitted on treaty due date
cash settlement confirmed within 10 days

jtbds.title: Handle workers compensation claim
jtbds.situation: employee reports workplace injury; adjuster must triage, coordinate medical management, determine compensability, establish reserves, manage RTW program, and track statutory benefit payments
jtbds.motivation: return employee to work quickly while controlling medical and indemnity costs
jtbds.outcome: claim accepted or denied; medical management underway; RTW plan in place
success_criteria: first contact within 24 hours
compensability determined within 14 days
RTW plan developed with restrictions

jtbds.title: Conduct annual premium audit
jtbds.situation: auditable policy requires end-of-term audit to reconcile actual vs estimated exposure; auditor collects payroll/revenue records, recalculates premium, and issues audit bill or return
jtbds.motivation: ensure premium accurately reflects actual exposure
jtbds.outcome: audit completed; final premium billed or returned; PAS updated
success_criteria: audit scheduled within 30 days of policy expiry
records received and reviewed
audit premium calculated
bill or return issued within 15 days of audit

jtbds.title: Manage cyber insurance incident response
jtbds.situation: cyber policyholder reports a breach or ransomware event; insurer must invoke breach response panel, coordinate coverage under cyber policy, and manage expenses vs policy limits
jtbds.motivation: minimize insured loss while coordinating covered response services efficiently
jtbds.outcome: IR firm engaged; coverage determination made; expenses tracked against sublimits
success_criteria: IR firm engaged within 4 hours of notice
coverage determination within 24 hours
expenses tracked against each sublimit

jtbds.title: Process medical malpractice claim
jtbds.situation: physician or hospital is sued for alleged malpractice; adjuster must engage defense counsel, evaluate damages, manage discovery, and pursue settlement or trial strategy
jtbds.motivation: resolve the claim at the lowest defensible cost while protecting the insured license and reputation
jtbds.outcome: claim resolved; defense costs and indemnity within reserve
success_criteria: defense counsel engaged within 48 hours
reserve established within 30 days
claim resolved within statute of limitations

jtbds.title: Conduct loss control survey
jtbds.situation: underwriter requires on-site inspection of a commercial risk; consultant must schedule visit, complete hazard survey, score risk, prepare report, and upload recommendations to UW system
jtbds.motivation: identify controllable hazards to reduce expected loss cost and support underwriting decision
jtbds.outcome: survey report submitted; recommendations delivered to insured; UW system updated
success_criteria: survey scheduled within 10 days of request
visit completed before binding if required
report submitted within 5 business days of visit

jtbds.title: Manage subrogation recovery litigation
jtbds.situation: after settling a claim, insurer pursues subrogation recovery through litigation against the responsible third party; attorney must file suit, manage discovery, negotiate settlement, and remit recovery
jtbds.motivation: recover claim dollars paid from the responsible party to reduce net loss cost
jtbds.outcome: recovery amount received; recovery allocated to claim; attorney fees posted
success_criteria: suit filed within statute of limitations
recovery maximized relative to damages paid
recovery posted to claim file within 5 days of receipt
